key_themes: Sharp price correction and high volatility after parabolic multi-month gains
Improved 2025 profitability (net income +27% to €5.2m, better margins) despite modest revenue decline (-2%)
Growing order book (+24%) and new orders (e.g. MBE 6000 from Japan for quantum-dot lasers in datacom)
High valuation concerns (elevated P/E vs. low analyst targets around €6) triggering profit-taking
Momentum tied to semiconductor equipment demand for AI/datacom/quantum applications
sources: 20+ recent X posts (high volume today discussing drop, halts, and results reaction)
Multiple news articles and press releases on 2025 full-year results (April 2026), Japan order, and proposed dividend increase
Yahoo Finance, Simply Wall St, company IR (riber.com), Morningstar, and TradingView coverage
summary: Riber S.A. (ALRIB.PA), a molecular beam epitaxy (MBE) equipment maker for advanced semiconductors, reported 2025 results with stable-to-slightly-lower revenue (€40.3m, -2%) but significantly improved profitability, 27% higher net income, a 24% larger order book, solid cash, and a proposed 25% dividend increase.[[1]](https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2026/04/08/3269808/0/en/RIBER-delivers-strong-earnings-growth-in-2025.html)[[2]](https://www.semiconductor-today.com/news_items/2026/apr/riber-100426.shtml) Positive long-term drivers include repeat orders for its MBE 6000 platform from Japan for quantum-dot laser production aimed at datacom markets.[[3]](https://www.riber.com/financial_documents/riber-receives-a-new-order-from-japan-for-mbe-6000-to-scale-quantum-dot-laser-production-for-datacom/) However, after an explosive run-up (hundreds of percent in the past year from a low base), the stock experienced a sharp correction today with trading halts, significant intraday drops, and heavy social media discussion focused on the revenue miss and profit-taking. Short-term sentiment is negative amid volatility, though the underlying growth narrative in semiconductors remains intact for patient investors.
